title: Complete Galar Fossilmon
description: Adds the Complete Galar Fossilmons that can be Resurrected with Bones.
body:
How to Install Download the latest version from Modrinth, and add the Folder to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world, to "datapacks" folder.

Discord addon link: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261567772828241920

For suggestions, teasers, and polls, check out this discord thread: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261193541422551100

Adds Complete Forms of Galar Fossilmon that can be Resurrected with Bones & their Fossil.

Raptorzolt
- Type: Rock/Electric
- Fossil: Fossilized Bird
- Prehistoric Creature: Utahraptor

Dracocerato
- Type: Rock/Dragon
- Fossil: Fossilized Drake
- Prehistoric Creature: Ceratosaurus

Dunkleovish
- Type: Rock/Water
- Fossil: Fossilized Fish
- Prehistoric Creature: Dunkleosteus

Arctoplesio
- Type: Rock/Ice
- Fossil: Fossilized Dino
- Prehistoric Creature: Plesiosaurus
